name: atlas-core
description: atlas-core JS modules (core/*) — flagged as ES modules so 'node tests/*.js' can load them. There is no npm dependency graph; the browser imports core/*.js directly.

scripts.test: node tests/test_layer_api.js && node tests/test_layer_router_fields.js && node tests/test_master_config.js && node tests/test_registry_cache_key_fields.js && node tests/test_registry_master_config.js && node tests/test_registry_write_and_versioning.js
